mapper.sql: SELECT cp.*, m.name AS member_name, m.email AS member_email FROM community_posts cp JOIN members m ON cp.member_id = m.member_id
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_posts cp WHERE cp.deleted = 0 AND cp.blinded = 0
AND (cp.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR cp.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE community_posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE community_post_id = #{communityPostId} AND member_id = #{memberId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE community_posts SET blinded = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE community_post_id = #{communityPostId} AND deleted = 0 AND blinded = 0
UPDATE community_posts SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE community_post_id = #{communityPostId} AND deleted = 0
